metadata.title: Quick Mid Control Turnaround with Two Clean Headshots in VALORANT
metadata.description:
Caught the opponents off guard with precise timing and calm aim through mid. Watch how smart positioning secured the double kill.
What’s your favorite mid control trick? Share your thoughts below!

Tell me your best mid control moment in the comments!

#valorant #shorts #gaming #fps #valorantclips
